data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Added new eval test case 'Confidence signal: double UNCERTAIN routes task to implementation-plan' to plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml. Test asserts: routes to implementation-plan, tracks per story not per task, records REPLAN_TRIGGER:failure, does not silently close tasks, threshold is 2 UNCERTAINs
